summary: Delegate exploration tasks to sub-agents when context is high to avoid burning your own window
problem: You need to explore an unfamiliar part of the codebase but context is already at 60-70%, making every read expensive
solution: Spin up a sub-agent with the Explore task type and a specific question. The agent runs in its own context window and returns a compact summary (~200 tokens) instead of dumping raw file contents into your window
root_cause: Reading files directly inflates your context linearly; sub-agents pay the exploration cost in their own window and hand back only the answer
